_meta.description: Sprite manifest for all playable character assets. Use this file to quickly find character sprites, animations, and color styles.
_meta.format: Individual PNG frames in PNG/{style}/{animation}/f####.png and packed spritesheets in spritesheet/{style}/spritesheet.png + .txt

packs.name: Classic Character
packs.description: 2D pixel art platformer character with 4 color styles, full combat and movement animation set

styles.description: Red jacket, blue pants — default color scheme
Green jacket, red pants — alternate color scheme
Violet jacket, blue pants — alternate color scheme
Blue jacket, red pants — alternate color scheme

animations.description: Standing pose, arms relaxed, slight smile — primary idle
Standing pose with more subtle movement — secondary idle
Longest idle animation with varied poses — extended idle
Running cycle with arms and legs in motion
Jump arc: launch, peak, descent
Falling pose with arms spread
First punch, right arm extended forward — combo starter
Second punch, combo continuation
Third punch, combo finisher with extra impact
Dash forward with attack, usable on ground and in air. Skip to frame 3 for air, switch to fall after frame 6
Hit reaction with yellow energy burst and recoil
Death sequence, character falls and collapses
Victory animation with arms raised and wide grin
Talking mouth movement variant A — for dialogue
Talking mouth movement variant B — for dialogue
Single frame clinging to wall, Mega Man X style
animations.note: Single PNG file, not in a subfolder

effects.description: White pixel burst/splash trail effect for dash attack on ground

usageNotes.punchCombo: Chain punch_A → punch_B → punch_C. Skip leading/trailing frames for smoother combo transitions.
usageNotes.dashAttack: On ground: play full animation with dash_fx behind character. In air: skip to frame 3, switch to fall after frame 6.
usageNotes.wallCling: Single frame. Use for Mega Man X-style wall sliding.

packs.name: Valiant Knight
packs.description: Armored medieval knight with sword and shield, 4 color styles, full combat with guard/block system and 3-hit attack combo

styles.description: Grey armor, red cape/shield, gold accents, orange-red helmet plume
Grey armor, purple cape/shield, gold accents, purple helmet plume
Grey-blue armor, brown cape/shield, gold accents, orange-gold helmet
Grey armor, green cape/shield, gold accents, green helmet plume

animations.description: Standing ready pose with sword raised and shield ready, cape flowing
Running with sword raised and shield forward, cape trailing
First attack with sword swing crescent effect — combo starter. Last 2 frames are idle transition (skip for combos)
Second attack variant — combo continuation
Third attack variant — combo finisher
Jump takeoff: crouch then launch upward
Mid-air pose loop with cape flowing upward
Falling animation loop with arms extended
Hit reaction with recoil, shield raised defensively
Death sequence — knight collapses to final pose
Raising shield into defensive guard position
Guard/block loop — holding shield in defensive stance
Lowering shield, returning from guard to ready position

effects.description: Light blue energy burst block impact effect — variant 1
Energy burst block impact effect — variant 2
Energy burst block impact effect — variant 3

usageNotes.attackCombo: Chain attack_A → attack_B → attack_C. Skip last 2 frames of attack_A for smooth transitions.
usageNotes.guardSystem: guard_start → guard (loop) → guard_end. Play block effects on successful blocks.
usageNotes.jumpSequence: jump_start → jump_loop (loop while airborne) → fall_loop (when descending)
